calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. JOHN JURI (AKA JAMES M. JURI)'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied. Defendant fails to provide sufficient proof of his claimed expenses and plaintiff is entitled to garnish 25% of defendant's net disposable income. See CCP 704.070(b)(2). COURT SHALL SIGN AND MAIL OUT A FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Off Calendar
